🇪🇸 ES 🇬🇧 EN
🏥 Salud 💪 Fitness 📐 Unidades 🧮 Día a día 💶 Finanzas 🔢 Matemáticas

🧮 Everyday Calculators

Useful tools for your daily life, available in one click.

🔢

Basic Calculator

Add, subtract, multiply and divide instantly. Supports keyboard input.

 🔬

Scientific Calculator

Trigonometry, logarithms, powers and mathematical constants.

 🍽️

Tip Calculator

Calculate the tip and split the bill between any number of people.

 🏷️

Discount Calculator

Calculate the final price after any discount and see how much you save.

 💱

Currency Converter

Convert between major world currencies with approximate reference rates.

 🎂

Age Calculator

Find out your exact age in years, months and days from your date of birth.

 ⏱️

Hours Calculator

Add or subtract hours and minutes. Calculate hours worked between two times.

 📊

Average Calculator

Calculate mean, median, mode and range of any list of numbers.

 🏛️

Roman Numerals Converter

Convert between decimal numbers and Roman numerals instantly.

 🔐

Password Generator

Generate strong, random passwords instantly with customisable options.

 📝

Word Counter

Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs in any text.
